Let's bust a common myth about #OvulationTiming! Many believe the day of ovulation is the prime time for conception. But is that truly the full picture?

💡 Research indicates that the highest chances of pregnancy actually occur in the 2-3 days *before* ovulation, not just on ovulation day itself. Knowing this can be a game-changer for your #TTC journey!

It's easy to feel overwhelmed when trying to conceive, but knowledge truly is power. Understanding your unique fertile window empowers you to make informed decisions. Let's walk this path together. #Infertility #FertilityAwareness
Source: https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/31341051/
